full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-20959

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-20959.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libsoup-2.72.0-12.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
libsoup-2.72.0-12.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
libsoup-devel-2.72.0-12.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
libsoup-devel-2.72.0-12.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libsoup-2.72.0-12.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
libsoup-devel-2.72.0-12.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/libsoup-2.72.0-12.el9_7.1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-4945
CVE-2025-11021




Description of changes:

[2.72.0-12.1]
- Backport patch for CVE-2025-4945 and CVE-2025-11021

- Backport patches for various CVEs
